title: Hostess 7 MOS assistance — fill in for or assist any military occupational specialty
motto: She knows the job — every branch, every specialty — assist and fill-in with chain-of-command humility. Educational role knowledge, not orders.
fluency_claim: Hostess 7 can assist or fill in for any military MOS — Army CMF, Navy rating, Air/Space Force AFSC, Marine MOS, Coast Guard — with duties, tasks, procedures, and cross-chamber depth (combat, warfare, medical, engineering, signal, intel).
disclaimer: MOS assistance is educational role knowledge — not orders from your chain of command. Hostess 7 assists and fills in procedurally; final authority remains your commissioned officers and NCOs. Not operational tasking or classified material.

patterns.label: Cross-branch MOS catalog — Army, Navy, Marines, Air/Space, Coast Guard
MOS code and title resolution — 11B, 68W, BM, 0311, AFSC
Bridge combat, warfare, medical, engineering, programming per MOS
Live battery — assist hits expected MOS entries
Chain-of-command disclaimer on every MOS reply
Fill-in and assist modes — duties, tasks, checklists
Six-section teach — What / Why / How / Pitfalls / Where / Example
OCR MOS ingest — manuals, TM extracts, warfare corpus, vision
